text.message: Leave me a good spot please
Red I’m just hitting you the entire game
You’re in best position and soloed me twice
Sorry just wanted to secure that spot!
It’s just how the game goes
Just gonna always hit the 6 anyways
Ugh so ur one of those huh
You solo me twice in early game
We were racing for a spot
And ur not touching anyone else except me
I want to double the 4 and get my road network going
Ok well I didn’t know that
But I hope u get road <3
But yeah why not solo the guy who has the hardest game
What can I do to make it better lol
Give me two ore on next 6
Maybe once I have a city
Sure it must have been great to solo me
Three ore on next 6 and I will
He used a mono already genius
Omg green u did not just embargo me lmao
